title: Metal Sonic
description: Turns the warden into metal sonic with custom sounds
body:
I AM THE ULTIMATE OVERLORD, METAL SONIC... I AM THE REAL SONIC

This pack replaces the warden with metal sonic and some custome sounds (requires optifine)


idk what else to say so... yeah...

HUE HUE HUE HUE🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥🔥
